title: Initiative Chart and Table Experience Enhancements
story: As a data analyst viewing initiative data in DataTools Pro, I want info tooltips on chart axes and table headers, color-coded bubble chart grouping with a legend, and filters positioned above the chart, so that I can better understand and explore initiative data visually.
description:
Multiple UX enhancements to the Initiative module's chart and table views:

### Info Icons
- Add "i" tooltip icons next to the Business Challenge and Impact axes on the bubble chart so users understand what each axis represents.
- Add "i" tooltip icons on all table column headers with descriptive text.

### Chart Legend and Multi-Series Grouping
- Introduce a Group By selector for the bubble chart that supports Line of Business, Topic, and Status.
- When grouped, color-code each bubble by its group value and render a clickable legend to the left of the chart.
- Users can toggle individual legend series on and off to focus on specific groups.

### Layout Changes
- Reposition filters above the chart and table instead of below.
- Add group-by table functionality consistent with other DataTools Pro modules.

### Dynamic Chart Updates
- Chart bubbles update automatically when filters or groupings change in the table.
- Chart visibility toggle (show/hide) works correctly without breaking filter-driven updates.
acceptance_criteria: Info "i" icons appear next to Business Challenge and Impact axes on the bubble chart
Info "i" icons appear on all table column headers with descriptive tooltip text
Chart supports grouping by Line of Business, Topic, or Status
When grouped, bubbles are color-coded by group with a legend displayed to the left of the chart
Users can toggle individual legend series on and off
Filters are positioned above the chart and table instead of below
Chart automatically updates when filters or groupings are changed in the table
Chart visibility toggle (show/hide) does not break filter-driven updates
Group-by table feature is available consistent with other DataTools Pro modules
Status update option is available from the chart view
ux_changes: Adds info tooltip icons to chart axes and table headers. Introduces multi-series color-coded bubble chart with clickable legend. Repositions filters above the chart and table. Adds chart visibility toggle and status update option.
middleware_changes: New grouping logic prepares chart series data dynamically based on the selected Group By column. Chart re-rendering pipeline reacts to filter and grouping changes from the DataTable component.
implementation_notes: Chart series are built dynamically from DataTable rows. When grouping is applied, each unique group value becomes a separate series with a distinct color. The chart listens for filter and grouping events from the table component to trigger re-renders. Legend series toggling hides/shows individual groups without refetching data.
comment_summary: Developer implemented the solution in stages: first added info icons to chart and table, then built dynamic chart updates tied to filter changes, and finally implemented multi-series legend grouping with color-coded bubbles per group value. The Group By feature supports Line of Business, Topic, and Status. A status update option was also added to the chart view.
